assignments.direction: Implement and test a genetic algorithm for job scheduling, focusing on representation schemes like priority-based encoding and selection mechanisms such as tournament selection.
Implement and test a reinforcement learning approach using Q-learning or Deep Q-Networks (DQN) to learn job sequencing policies for minimizing total tardiness.
Implement and test a hybrid approach combining simulated annealing with local search heuristics, specifically exploring how perturbation strategies can escape local optima in job scheduling.
